auth.label: Admin API access token
auth.description: Shopify Admin API access token sent with the X-Shopify-Access-Token header. Create or install a custom app and copy its Admin API access token: https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/authentication-authorization/access-tokens

extraFields.label: Shop domain
extraFields.description: The store's myshopify.com domain, such as acme.myshopify.com. A Shopify admin URL for the same shop is also accepted.

actions.name: execute_graphql
actions.description: Execute a JSON-friendly Shopify Admin GraphQL query or mutation against the connected shop.

variables.description: GraphQL variables keyed by variable name.

inputSchema.description: The Shopify Admin GraphQL request payload.

data.description: The raw object returned by Shopify Admin GraphQL.

extensions.description: The raw object returned by Shopify Admin GraphQL.

outputSchema.description: The raw Shopify Admin GraphQL response data and extensions.

actions.name: get_collection
actions.description: Retrieve one Shopify collection by GraphQL global ID.

anyOf.description: The collection update timestamp when returned by Shopify.
The collection image URL when returned by Shopify.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Shopify Admin GraphQL.

anyOf.description: A normalized Shopify collection detail.

actions.name: get_customer
actions.description: Retrieve one Shopify customer by GraphQL global ID.

anyOf.description: The customer first name when returned by Shopify.
The customer last name when returned by Shopify.
The customer email address when returned by Shopify.
The customer phone number when returned by Shopify.
The customer account state when returned by Shopify.
The customer's lifetime order count encoded as an unsigned 64-bit integer string.
The customer's lifetime amount spent when returned.
The currency code for the customer's lifetime amount spent when returned.
The customer creation timestamp when returned by Shopify.
The customer update timestamp when returned by Shopify.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Shopify Admin GraphQL.

anyOf.description: A normalized Shopify customer detail.

actions.name: get_inventory_item
actions.description: Retrieve one Shopify inventory item by GraphQL global ID.

inputSchema.description: The Shopify inventory item lookup input.

anyOf.description: The inventory item SKU when returned by Shopify.

tracked.description: Whether Shopify tracks inventory levels for this item.

requiresShipping.description: Whether this inventory item requires shipping.

anyOf.description: The ISO country code of origin when returned by Shopify.
The harmonized system code when returned by Shopify.
The inventory item creation timestamp when returned.
The inventory item update timestamp when returned.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Shopify Admin GraphQL.

anyOf.description: A normalized Shopify inventory item detail.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Shopify inventory item response.

actions.name: get_location
actions.description: Retrieve one Shopify location by GraphQL global ID.

fulfillsOnlineOrders.description: Whether this location can fulfill online orders.

anyOf.description: The first address line when returned by Shopify.
The location city when returned by Shopify.
The location province or state when returned by Shopify.
The location country when returned by Shopify.
The location postal code when returned by Shopify.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Shopify Admin GraphQL.

anyOf.description: A normalized Shopify location detail.

actions.name: get_order
actions.description: Retrieve one Shopify order by GraphQL global ID.

anyOf.description: The order email address when returned by Shopify.
The order phone number when returned by Shopify.
The display financial status returned by Shopify.
The display fulfillment status returned by Shopify.
The order currency code returned by Shopify.
The current order total amount in shop currency when returned.
The current order total currency code in shop currency when returned.
The customer ID associated with the order when returned.
The display name of the customer associated with the order when returned.
The order creation timestamp when returned by Shopify.
The order update timestamp when returned by Shopify.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Shopify Admin GraphQL.

anyOf.description: A normalized Shopify order detail.

actions.name: get_product
actions.description: Retrieve one Shopify product by GraphQL global ID.

anyOf.description: The product handle when returned by Shopify.
The product status when returned by Shopify.
The product vendor when returned by Shopify.
The product type when returned by Shopify.
The product HTML description when returned by Shopify.
The product creation timestamp when returned by Shopify.
The product update timestamp when returned by Shopify.
The online store product URL when returned by Shopify.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Shopify Admin GraphQL.

anyOf.description: A normalized Shopify product detail.

actions.name: get_shop
actions.description: Retrieve basic shop information for the connected Shopify Admin token.

inputSchema.description: No input is required to retrieve the connected Shopify shop.

myshopifyDomain.description: The canonical myshopify.com domain for the shop.

anyOf.description: The shop primary domain URL when returned by Shopify.
The shop primary domain host when returned by Shopify.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Shopify Admin GraphQL.

actions.name: list_collections
actions.description: List Shopify collections with optional search query and cursor pagination.

first.description: The first number of records to return.

query.description: A Shopify Admin API search query string.

anyOf.description: The collection update timestamp when returned by Shopify.
The collection image URL when returned by Shopify.
A Shopify GraphQL pagination cursor.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Shopify Admin GraphQL.

hasNextPage.description: Whether another page exists after this page.

hasPreviousPage.description: Whether another page exists before this page.

anyOf.description: A Shopify GraphQL pagination cursor.
A Shopify GraphQL pagination cursor.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Shopify collection list response.
